[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person in a white shirt sits on a bench outdoors while large, bold white text reading “ASELI” overlays the bottom of the image.

Main Subject:
A person viewed from behind and slightly to the side is seated on or near a green bench, facing away from the camera. The person appears to be wearing a white top and dark pants and is holding or resting something small near their lap or hands.

Setting:
The scene is outdoors in a yard or park-like area with green foliage and grass. There are bright, natural lighting conditions, and the background includes trees or shrubs and a light-colored structure.

Visual Details:
The camera angle is slightly elevated and directed toward the bench area. Several large, dark circular ring shapes appear in the foreground and midground, with one ring on the left side and another on the right side, both outlined in lighter tones. The overlay text “ASELI” is centered near the bottom in large white letters with a dark outline.

Visible Text:
ASELI

Practical Summary:
The image shows an outdoor scene with a seated person and prominent circular ring-like shapes in the foreground. Bold text reading “ASELI” is displayed over the lower part of the image.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
